identity.name: WildFire Malware Trigger — Simulated Backdoor
identity.summary: Auto-generated draft from CortexSim scenario SIM-CDR-005. Plane: CDR. Primary technique: T1105. Requires human enrichment of BIOC logic + panw_mapping rule_ids.
identity.description:
Auto-generated draft from CortexSim scenario SIM-CDR-005. Plane: CDR. Primary technique: T1105. Requires human enrichment of BIOC logic + panw_mapping rule_ids.

Source scenario: SIM-CDR-005.
UC: WildFire Cloud Intelligence Validation / TC: Known-Bad File Execution and C2 Simulation.

prerequisites.description: Lab environment matching scenario SIM-CDR-005 requirements.

payload.code:
# step-1: Download WildFire EICAR-equivalent test file
mkdir -p /tmp/wf_sim && \
echo '[*] Downloading WildFire test file (known-bad signature)...' && \
curl -sSL "https://wildfire.paloaltonetworks.com/publicapi/test/elf" \
  -o /tmp/wf_sim/wildfire_test.elf 2>/dev/null || \
curl -sSL "https://www.eicar.org/download/eicar.com.txt" \
  -o /tmp/wf_sim/eicar_test.txt 2>/dev/null; \
echo '[*] Creating synthetic known-bad binary for WildFire trigger...' && \
python3 -c "
import os, struct
# ELF header for a minimal Linux x86_64 executable (WildFire test pattern)
elf = b'\x7fELF\x02\x01\x01\x00' + b'\x00' * 8
elf += struct.pack('<HHIQQQIHHHHHH', 2, 62, 1, 0x400080, 64, 0, 0, 64, 56, 1, 0, 0, 0)
elf += struct.pack('<IIQQQQ', 1, 5, 0, 0x400000, 0x400000, 0x80, 0x80, 0x200000)
elf += b'\x48\x31\xff\x48\x31\xd2\x48\x31\xf6\x0f\x05'  # syscall stub
with open('/tmp/wf_sim/test_backdoor.elf', 'wb') as f: f.write(elf + b'\x00' * (0x80 - len(elf)))
print('[*] Synthetic ELF test file created')
" && \
chmod +x /tmp/wf_sim/test_backdoor.elf && \
ls -la /tmp/wf_sim/
# step-2: Execute simulated backdoor in container context
echo '[*] Executing WildFire test binary...' && \
timeout 5 /tmp/wf_sim/test_backdoor.elf 2>/dev/null; \
echo "[*] Exit code: $?" && \
ls -la /proc/$$/exe 2>/dev/null; \
echo '[*] Backdoor execution simulation complete'
# step-3: Simulate C2 beacon (curl to test endpoint mimicking malware callback)
echo '[*] Simulating C2 beacon activity...' && \
for i in 1 2 3; do \
  curl -sSA "Mozilla/5.0 (compatible; MSIE 9.0)" \
    -H "X-CortexSim: beacon-${i}" \
    -H "X-Session: $(cat /proc/sys/kernel/random/uuid 2>/dev/null || echo 'sim-uuid')" \
    --connect-timeout 3 \
    "http://192.0.2.1/beacon?id=SIM-CDR-005&seq=${i}" 2>/dev/null || true; \
  sleep 2; \
done; \
echo '[*] C2 beacon simulation complete (3 intervals)'

expected_artifacts.description: Process execution matching curl (heuristic from scenario step step-01)
Outbound HTTP(S) request from the scenario step
Process execution matching nc (heuristic from scenario step step-04)
File access pattern matching '.enc' (encrypted-output marker) (heuristic from scenario step step-04)
